alkylation concentration: Et3OBF4 (100 mg, 0.53 mmol) was added in three equal portions
cleavage agent: the mixture was digested with trypsin
fragmentation method: collision induced dissociation (CID) at 35% normalised CE
instrument: LCMSMS carried out either on a Qstar Pulsar i QqTOF mass spectrometer
ionization type: the sample was analysed using ESI-MS
labeling: the sample was then centrifuged, an aliquot (100 μL) was taken from the supernatant and digested using trypsin.
